candidate_title: MOF-808 Insulation with Low-Temp Regeneration for Passive Building Cooling
reviewer_note: Cross-domain bridge between MOF thermal management and building insulation is well-grounded. Low-temp regeneration reduces energy overhead. Strong mechanism specificity. Commercially relevant for building efficiency retrofits.

candidate_title: NiFe-LDH Catalytic Ventilation Filters for Low-Energy Air Purification
key_flaw: needs stronger differentiation from existing catalytic filter products
reviewer_note: Interesting application of NiFe-LDH to air purification but novelty framing needs sharpening vs existing catalytic filter approaches. Plausible chemistry but energy advantage vs conventional is underspecified.

candidate_title: Quantum Dot BiVO4 Photocatalytic Desalination for Offshore Platforms
reviewer_note: Novel combination of QD sensitization with BiVO4 photocatalysis for seawater desalination in offshore context. Mechanistically well-specified. Offshore platform freshwater logistics are costly making this commercially compelling.

candidate_title: MOF-808 Integrated Offshore Direct Air Capture for Corrosion Mitigation
key_flaw: dual-function hypothesis needs separate validation for each claimed effect
reviewer_note: MOF-808 DAC in offshore context has potential but combining corrosion mitigation as a co-benefit weakens the primary claim. Would approve with one mechanism as primary focus.

candidate_title: Quantum Dot-BiVO4 Sensitized Microalgae for Synergistic Bio-hydrogen
reviewer_note: Creative integration of QD-BiVO4 with biological hydrogen production. Synergy between photocatalytic electron transfer and microalgal hydrogen evolution is mechanistically coherent. Good novelty and reasonable plausibility.

candidate_title: Passivated Perovskite Bio-Photocatalysts for Biomass Valorization
key_flaw: perovskite stability in aqueous biological environments unresolved
reviewer_note: Interesting direction but perovskite degradation in wet biological media is not addressed. Strong conceptual novelty but technical plausibility is limited by this challenge.

candidate_title: Perovskite Tandem Trap Passivation via OABr Analogues
reviewer_note: Concrete mechanism for addressing trap states in perovskite tandem junctions using OABr analogues. Well-grounded in passivation chemistry with clear stability benefits. Strong commercial relevance to perovskite solar efficiency improvements.

candidate_title: Degradation-Resistant Sulfide Electrolytes via Bulk Dopants
key_flaw: mechanism specificity vs existing doping literature needs clearer differentiation
reviewer_note: Addressing sulfide electrolyte stability is commercially important for solid-state batteries. The doping approach is well-explored; needs clearer novelty differentiation from existing literature.

candidate_title: Quantum dot-sensitized photo-electrochemical hydrogen generation in seawater
reviewer_note: Strong mechanistic grounding in QD sensitization for PEC hydrogen evolution in seawater. High impact if the photoelectrochemical efficiency and saltwater durability hold. Good commercial pathway for marine renewable hydrogen.

candidate_title: High-efficiency TPV-driven seawater electrolysis via waste heat recycling
key_flaw: TPV efficiency in the temperature range of marine operations needs experimental validation
reviewer_note: Thermophotovoltaic waste-heat-to-hydrogen is an interesting dual-use concept. The seawater electrolysis integration is novel but TPV viability at moderate marine temperatures is uncertain.

candidate_title: Perovskite Solar Cell Tandem Stacking Increases Charge Collection Efficiency in Concentrated PV-Thermal Systems
reviewer_note: Well-specified tandem design for concentrated PV-thermal systems. Integration of perovskite tandem with thermal collection is technically grounded and addresses a real efficiency gap in CPV systems. Strong commercial relevance for utility-scale solar.

candidate_title: Photocatalytic CO2 Reduction Using Solar Tandems
reviewer_note: Strong mechanistic grounding and high novelty for solar-driven CO2 reduction using tandem architectures. Both novelty and plausibility are high. Approve but note that CO2 feedstock economics must be considered for commercialization.
